ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "symboling" INTEGER /* Symboling for vehicle safety rating */,
  "normalized_losses" INTEGER /* Normalized losses value */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  "aspiration" TEXT /* Aspiration type (e.g., std, turbo) */,
  "number_of_doors" TEXT /* Number of doors on the vehicle */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, hatchback) */,
  "drive_wheels" TEXT /* Drive wheels configuration (e.g., fwd, rwd) */,
  "engine_location" TEXT /* Location of the engine (e.g., front, rear) */,
  "wheel_base" REAL /* Wheelbase length */,
  "length" REAL /* Total length of the vehicle */,
  "width" REAL /* Total width of the vehicle */,
  "height" REAL /* Total height of the vehicle */,
  "curb_weight" INTEGER /* Curb weight of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., dohc, ohc) */,
  "number_of_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_size" INTEGER /* Engine size in cubic inches */,
  "fuel_system" TEXT /* Fuel delivery system type (e.g., mpfi) */,
  "bore" REAL /* Bore diameter */,
  "stroke" REAL /* Stroke length */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower output */,
  "peak_rpm" INTEGER /* Peak RPM of the engine */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* Miles per gallon in the city */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Miles per gallon on the highway */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the vehicle specifications */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard the vehicle meets */,
  "color_options" TEXT /* JSON array of available color options */,
  "trim_levels" TEXT /* JSON array of available trim levels */,
  "additional_features" TEXT /* JSON array of additional features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES manufacturers ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_body_style FOREIGN KEY ("body_style") REFERENCES body_styles ("body_style"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive_wheels FOREIGN KEY ("drive_wheels") REFERENCES drive_wheels ("drive_wheel"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_type FOREIGN KEY ("engine_type") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the manufacturer */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel in MJ/L */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_styles" (
  "body_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body style */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Name of the body style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body style */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_wheels" (
  "drive_wheel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive wheel configuration */,
  "drive_wheel" TEXT /* Name of the drive wheel configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the drive wheel configuration in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_wheel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "valve_configuration" TEXT /* Valve configuration of the engine */,
  "turbocharged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the engine is turbocharged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower rating */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time to reach 60 mph in seconds */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque output in lb-ft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being priced */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* JSON array of available incentives */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
